title: Manniclones
description: Adds clones using minecrafts new mannequin entity.
body:
# Manniclones

Newest version of manniclones v0.4b for minecraft 1.21.11

## Required RP (Recourece Pack / Texture Pack)

Donwload the required RP: [Click to download RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xoU8GrQg/versions/nRY6pJlI/Manniclones%20texturepack%20for%20v0.4b.zip)

## Features

### The Manniclone

The manniclone is how we refer to clones since they use the new mannequin entity from 1.21.11. The manniclone will copy your hands and armour, you also share one inventory and health bar (dying will kill all maniclones).
The manniclone is very overpowered so to balance it the manniclones are imortal the only way to get rid of them is to send them in to the void.
So on a competetive mc server it would be a great thing to have to escape traps, but you could also trap the manniclone.

### The mannicloner

A custom ender peral that when lands spawns a manniclone.

Crafted like this:
[The mannicloner crafting recepie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3eee64fa0952d44ee42a06ddb9b51a41196243f.png)

### The Diamond chorus

It teleports you to a random of your existing clones with no way to control it.

Crafted like this:
[Diamond chorus crafting recepie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07bfe0a1ac6ab8d041e41186b0d36ddf8f27645a.png)


## Known issuses

It is imposible to tp to a manniclone that is unloaded.

The mannicloner sometimes yust freezes in the air and stops loading chuncks.

## Planned features for release

Replace the mannicloner with a manniclone spawn egg.

## Planned features

Maybee sounds for the Mannicloner and the Diamond chorus.

Some way to controll witch clone to tp to propobly a new item.

Advancments
